summary: The protagonist successfully advances to the Warrior class in Clags Tower after passing a challenging test against Khan, earning new skills and a hidden quest to meet the Knight of Kione. Simultaneously, their pet egg hatches, revealing a surprisingly talkative and arrogant Marionette Bear, whom the protagonist quickly teaches a lesson and names Tangy. As the protagonist logs out, they are reminded of their upcoming streamer debut.
key_moments: The protagonist undertakes a trial with Khan, successfully becoming a Warrior and receiving a hidden quest.
Their pet egg hatches, revealing an arrogant, talking Marionette Bear that the protagonist names Tangy.
The protagonist logs out of the game, then learns about their impending streamer debut.
